entries.name: user-flush-last-active
entries.purpose: Every minute: dispatch UpdateLastActiveJob so the last_active_at buffer flushes to DB. Alternative to a supervisord-managed worker for small deployments.

entries.name: user-cleanup-orphaned-profiles
entries.purpose: Hourly at :17. Delete Profile rows that have no User AND are older than `user.privacy.orphaned_profile_ttl_hours` (default 24h).

entries.name: user-purge-erased-users
entries.purpose: Daily at 04:00 UTC. Hard-delete User rows whose `deleted_at + user.privacy.erasure_hold_days` has passed. Cascade deletes their TenantMember + Profile rows.

entries.name: user-auto-reactivate-suspended
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes. Find Users with status=suspended AND reactivation_scheduled_for <= now(); transition to status=active + fire UserActivated.

entries.name: user-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Hourly. Compute `academorix.user.active.count` per status + `academorix.user.tenant_member.count` gauges + `academorix.user.purge_pending.count`. Publishes to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.
